overview: A professional single-page portfolio website for Seenu Arjunan, a Graphic Designer with 6+ years of experience. Dark-themed with bold black and gold branding, featuring a hero section, animated role showcase, work experience timeline, skills grid, education cards, and contact section.
features: Animated hero with rotating job titles
Skills showcase with gold accent tags
Contact section with email, phone, and Behance link
Dark theme with black and gold/yellow branding
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
